title: Smart Safeguards Gate
paragraphs:
PURIUM Co, Ltd. was founded in September 2016. Under a vision of “Safer, cleaner spaces”, we have developed,
patented and commercialized the [Smart Safeguards Gate], a state-of-the-art, first of its kind product.
*Technology Innovation Team : Corporate Annexed R&D Institute (Sep. 19, 2019, Korean Industrial Technology Association)

title: Management philosophy
paragraphs:
PURIUM is committed to cleaner indoor environments.
All PURIUM employees are dedicated to safer and cleaner spaces free of fine (and ultra-fine) particulate matter.
We are firmly committed to technology development, securing intellectual property and enhancing performance. With an enterprising spirit, we continue to improve and update our products.

title:
Cyclone
Turbo Air Shot
headings: Super-large dust connector fan (dust scattering prevention technology)

Eco-friendly dual UV-A and UV-C
anti-microbial & anti-virus technology
paragraphs: 12 patented wind discharge ports harnessing the Bernoulli's principle and Venturi effect from aeronautical engineering mounted on the top and sides of the product generate silent yet powerful cyclones to effectively remove fine (ultra-fine) particulate matter, microbes and viruses from garments, skin and personal effects.

A total of 4 carbon nanotube + HEPA 13 filters and super-large dust collector fans created with innovative PURIUM technology are installed on the left and right to collect and trap any fine (ultra-fine) dust, viruses and microbes dislodged by the turbo cyclones. Any harmful gases, bacteria and viruses and odors are removed before discharging clean air into the indoor environment.

Dual UV-A and UV-C anti-microbe and anti-virus modules are installed around the 12 wind discharge ports and 4 dust collectors, effectively removing microbes, viruses and odors from the air and suppressing any mold growth or fruit flies. (Fully tested for disinfecting and anti-virus performance)

Natural phytoncides extracted from cypress forests in Jangseong of Jeolla Province create the ambience of a walk through the forest in the indoors. Natural phytoncides in the air provide an outstanding deodorizing and anti-microbial effect, cleaning and refreshing the air indoors.
lists:
+HEPA13 filter
0.3um (Removes 99.9% of micrometer-scale fine particulate matter)

Anti-bacterial/anti-virus
Kills 99.9% of 6 common bacteria: E. Coli, Bacillus subtillis, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, Salmonella, etc.

Anti-virus
Kills 99.9% of 3 common viruses: Human Rs virus(long), Rotavirus(Wa) and Human coronavirus(229E)

Disinfecting
Kills 99.9% of 6 common bacteria: E. Coli, Bacillus subtillis, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, Salmonella, etc.

Anti-virus
Kills 99.9% of 3 common viruses: Human Rs virus(long), Rotavirus(Wa) and Human coronavirus(229E)

title: AI disease control mode
headings:
Super-large dust connector fan
(with dust scattering prevention technology)
paragraphs:
This state-of-the-art device ensures clean and safe air in multi-use facilities open to the public.
Five key features (disinfecting, antimicrobial, purifying, dust collection and odor neutralization) are integrated into a single, dual-mode product.
Installed as gateway at multi-use facility access points
Removes harmful bacteria on people and objects entering indoor spaces
260mm X 230mm HEPA filters are installed on the left and right sides, removing 99.9% of PM 2.5, 0.3 ㎛ fine (ultra-fine) particulate matter.

4 ultra-large 200mm dust collector fans plus H13-H15 HEPA+ carbon nano tube filters remove fine (ultra-fine) particulate matter, odors, TVOCs (volatile organic compounds), ammonia, vinyl acetate, acetaldehyde, formaldehyde, hydrogen sulfide and cigarette smoke.
The powerful air curtain created by the turbo air shot cyclones prevents ingress of fine (ultra-fine) particulate matter, bacteria and harmful chemicals, preserving a clean indoor environment.
43-inch digital signage installed on the outside of the unit may be used to carry various promotional and advertising content. PURIUM can be scaled for use in diverse conditions and environments.

Temperature, humidity, CO2, VOCs and PM 1.0 levels are monitored in real-time and displayed on the internal monitor screens. Users are provided real-time reports on indoor air quality, and device operation is controlled by AI according to current indoor air quality.
Low-power DC design harnessing automotive electronics technology allows for around-the-clock operation at around KRW 20,000 per month on ordinary 220V power, without the need for electrical works.
Eco-friendly dual UV-A and UV-C disinfecting and anti-virus modules neutralize any microbes or viruses suspended in the air.
PURIUM features a unique modular design to accommodate a host of accessories including thermal imaging cameras, people counters, QR code readers and floor panel disinfectors.

12 patented wind discharge ports harnessing the Bernoulli principle and Venturi effect from aeronautical engineering mounted on the top and sides of the product generate silent yet powerful cyclones to effectively remove fine (ultra-fine) particulate matter, microbes and viruses from garments, skin and personal effects.
260mm X 230mm HEPA filters are installed on the left and right sides, removing 99.9% of PM 2.5, 0.3 ㎛ fine (ultra-fine) particulate matter.
PURIUM features a unique modular design to accommodate a host of accessories including thermal imaging cameras, people counters, QR code readers and platform disinfectors.

Dual UV-A and UV-C anti-microbe and anti-virus modules are installed around the 12 wind discharge ports and 4 dust collectors, effectively removing microbes, viruses and odors from the air and suppressing any mold growth or fruit flies. (Fully tested for disinfecting and anti-virus performance)
PURIUM features a unique modular design to accommodate a host of accessories including thermal imaging cameras, people counters, QR code readers and floor panel disinfectors.
Carbon filters are used to remove 7 key hazardous gases

Any harmful gases, bacteria and viruses and odors are removed before discharging clean air into the indoor environment.

title: For large facilities
paragraphs: Installed at entrances and exits of large multi-use facilities, ingress of fine (ultra-fine) dust, microbes, viruses and other harmful materials can be prevented. PURIUM technology collects and removes contaminants from the skin and garments, keeping indoor spaces clean and safe.

This disease control gate designed for small facilities such as nurseries, offices and childcare facilities features low-noise, low-power operation while preserving a safe and clean indoor environment.

Our systems can easily be augmented for spaces with more stringent security or disease control requirements. A phytoncide spray module is available for enhanced anti-microbial and odor neutralization performance, while for courts, police stations and correctional facilities having strict access control and security requirements, we offer metal detector and speed gate modules to provide top-tier disease control and tight security features simultaneously (expansion modules may be selected individually depending on intended use).

Our walk-through systems target facilities with high floating populations such as airports, train stations, terminals and mixed cultural facilities, and feature upgraded dust collectors and UV-LED sterilization lamps. Persons entering facilities are disinfected as they walk through the system, without the need to stop.

In contrast to our main product lineup, our indoor systems are designed with personal hygiene and health in mind. Installed at the entrance to homes or workspaces, our systems use and air shower to dislodge and collect any contaminants from persons entering the protected space. In standby mode, our indoor systems perform intelligent indoor air quality analysis to always maintain a clean and safet indoor environment.

It is an eco-friendly, low-carbon, ESG smart multi-air shower made of pure Korean cypress wood that maximizes the harmless forest bathing effect of indoor air by using natural phytoncide extracted from eco-friendly Korean cypress wood and cypress wood. Luxurious interiors can also be applied by using wood from external materials, and it is a built-in customized product.

A product that can actively enjoy the effect of reducing the amount by utilizing the self-promotion of the installation site or external advertisement through a large multimedia advertising module at the front. It can be used in a variety of ways, such as disaster notifications, weather information, and videos, and the front advertising module standard can be customized according to the user's request.

title: Installation cases
paragraphs: Please contact us at our after-sale care service hotline for prompt support.

title: Purchase inquiries
paragraphs:
1. Items of personal information collected
The company shall collect the following personal information for membership registration, counseling, and service application.

- Collection items : name, phone number, mobile phone number, address, access log.
- How to collect personal information : Purchase inquiries, Contact us

2. Purpose for collection and use of personal information
The company shall use the collected personal information for the following purposes.

- Implementation of a contract on service provision and payment of charges according to service provision and payment of charges.
- Membership management - Identification based on use of membership services.

3. Period of retention and use of personal information
Basically, the company shall destroy the personal information without delay after the purpose of collecting and using personal information is achieved. However, the following information will be preserved for the period specified for the following reasons.

A. Reasons for holding information according to the company's internal policy
- Records of illegal use record
- Reason for preservation : Prevention of illegal use
- Preservation period : 1 year

B. Reasons for holding information under relevant laws and regulations
- Records of contract or withdrawal of subscription
- Reasons for preservation : Act on the Protection of Consumers in Electronic Commerce
- Preservation period : 5 years

- Records of payment and supply of goods, etc.
- Reasons for preservation : Act on the Protection of Consumers in Electronic Commerce
- Preservation period : 5 years

- Records of Electronic Financial Transactions
- Reasons for preservation: Electronic Financial Transactions Act
- Preservation period: 5 years

- Records of consumer complaints or disputes
- Reasons for preservation : Act on the Protection of Consumers in Electronic Commerce
- Preservation period : 3 years

4. Procedures and methods for destroying personal information
Generally, the company shall destroy the information without delay after the purpose of collecting and using personal information is achieved. The procedure and method of destruction are as follows.

- Destruction procedure
- The information entered by the member for membership shall be transferred to a separate DB (separate document box in the case of paper) after achievement of our desired purposes and destroyed after storage for a certain period of time for information protection reasons (refer to retention and usage period) in accordance with our policies and other related laws. The personal information transferred to a separate DB shall be not used for any purpose other than being held unless it is legal.

- Destruction Method
- Personal information stored in electronic file formats shall be deleted using a technical method that cannot repeat records. - Personal information printed on paper shall be crushed with a grinder or destroyed through incineration.

5. Provision of Personal information
Basically, the company shall not provide users' personal information to the outside. However, several exceptions are made in the following cases.

- If necessary for product delivery, installation, or A/S (name, mobile phone number, installation area address)
- If the users have agreed in advance

6. Civil service regarding personal information
In order to protect customers' personal information and handle complaints related to personal information, the company shall designate the related departments and personal information management managers as follows.

Person in charge of personal information management
- Name : Administrator
- E-mail : Nova secure inquiry portal

title: Delivery and installation
headings: Positioning the left and right columns
Securing the bridge to the columns
Power module (mounting, connecting, installing) and final inspection
paragraphs: The PURIUM system is safely transported to the installation site in specially designed hard cases. Installation is carried out by skilled expert engineers, maintaining compliance with all safety regulations.
Installation of PURIUM systems begins with ‘safe transport.’
Specially designed hard cases ensure that PURIUM systems are transported safely to the installation site without risk of damage or breakage.
Systems are knocked down for transport, and are comprised of left and right columns and a bridge (top). The three sections are joined (assembled) on-site.
First, the bridge section is centered and slowly raised into position using a special lift.
The lift is fixed in position, and the left and right columns are moved into position as shown in the photograph. Special pins are used to temporarily secure the columns to the bridge.
※ The temporary pins (screws) were designed with safety as the prime consideration, and will not come lose or fall out.
After temporarily securing the left and right columns, fine adjustments are made to ensure a seamless fit with the bridge. Then the three pieces are fixed in position for final assembly.
※ Our installation engineers always work in teams of 2, using safety ladders and maintaining compliance with work safety guidelines.   (Compliance is mandatory.)

The power module may be installed in either of the right and left columns. The power module is mounted, connected and installed in the appropriate column to complete installation. Once installation is complete, a final inspection of the external appearance and operating state of the product is carried out preceding demonstration to the customer.
Upon completion of installation, the product is started up to confirm normal operation. The customer is briefed thoroughly on the functions of the product and directions for use.
The product installation process is completed with the signing of the installation and handover form.

title: Monthly care service
paragraphs: PURIUM offers regular free and paid care services (product diagnostics, cleaning, replacement of consumables, phytoncide spray-down) at PURIUM-equipped sites.
Normal operation of the product is verified by inspecting external appearance, operational state (mode), windflow and noise levels.

If anomalies are discovered, free parts replacement and other after-sale services are provided for products purchased less than 1 year prior. For products beyond 1 year, parts are replaced at a 50% discounted rate.
PURIUM provides software updates at regular intervals to improve and stabilize performance.
As part of inspection, OS and electronic components software version checks are performed with updates as needed to ensure your system is always up to date.
PURIUM systems integrate indoor air quality maintenance and disease control features into one. To ensure proper functionality and consistent performance, regular cleaning is essential.
Cleaning is carried out according to a detailed and meticulous care service procedure.
The dust collector and pre-filters are comprised of carbon nano tube and H13 HEPA filters. For optimal performance, these filters must be replaced at regular intervals.
PURIUM provides dust collector filter replacement services every three month.
PURIUM dust collector filters are equipped with dual eco-friendly UV-A disinfecting lamps. This removes and keeps out various microbes, viruses and other harmful substances.

PURIUM phytoncide cartridges contain natural phytoncides extracted from cypress trees in Jangseong, Jeolla Province. Phytoncides have outstanding deodorizing and antimrobial properties, and help to keep the air indoors clean and refreshing.
8 to 24 phytoncide cartridges are provided depending on the product model
Natural phytoncide solution is sprayed in and around the product once inspection, cleaning and replacement of consumables has been completed.

title: ESG Management
headings: PURIUM’s ESG management strategy and objectives
paragraphs: ESG stands for Environmental, Social and Governance. Today, ESG is used globally as a standard for assessing the non-financial performance of enterprises. ESG encompasses a number of different concepts, including corporate social responsibility, sustainability, creation of shared value and sustainable development. The focus is on key non-financial factors which may have an impact on financial value in the long term. Toward ESG management implementation, PURIUM will systematically establish and pursue management areas, strategies and objectives.
· Job creation
· Fostering partners
· Consumer satisfaction
· Developing and furnishing environmentally friendly products
· Developing and furnishing environmentally friendly services
· Human rights and labor issues
· Marginalization of vulnerable groups
· Price-fixing and other unfair acts
· Greenhouse gas emissions
· Environmental pollution
· Resource depletion

EPEAT : The Electronic Product Environmental Assessment Tool (EPEAT) is an environmental friendliness/energy certification co-administered by the US Green Electronics Council and Underwriters Laboratories, the most influential safety standards institution in North America.

PURIUM's ‘ESG Management Proclamation Ceremony’ was held on January 25, 2022. At the ceremony, the company announced its vision to △ Address ESG management weaknesses, △ Realize a healthy workplace through EPEAT certification, △ Expand the D2D market, △ Reinforce eco-friendly management practices by achieving carbon net neutrality, △ Promote healthier work-life balance, △ Foster master talent, and △ Establish a merit-based corporate culture. All PURIUM employees signed the ‘PURIUM ESG Management Objectives Pledge’, promising action in ESG management practices including voluntary participation in community service activities.

We are on a mission to create cleaner, safer spaces. We take society’s heightened expectations for environmentally friendly management, transparent management practices and corporate social responsibility seriously. Our first CSR report was issued in 2021, and starting in 2022, we will issue biannual ESG management reports to share PURIUM’s ESG plans and achievements.
lists: Economic - corporate management activities (economic accountability for products and services, etc.)

· Addressing ESG vulnerabilities
(90% compliance rate by 2022

title: Environmental Management
headings: Working with vendors in carbon net neutrality practices
paragraphs: PURIUM's product is safely transported to the installation site in specially designed hard cases. Installation is carried out by skilled expert engineers, maintaining compliance with all safety regulations.

PURIUM is firmly committed to sustainable business practices and honoring corporate social responsibility obligations, acquiring the ISO14001 (Environmental Management System) certification in October 2021

PURIUM became a member of the K-RE100 campaign in 2021. K-RE100 members pledge to source 100% of electricity from renewable energy sources by 2050, and PURIUM is taking the initiative to accelerate accomplishment of this goal. Within 2022 we will adopt solar PV power generation and environmentally friendly EVs, reducing our carbon emissions by 50% with the aim of complete net neutrality by 2030.

The PURIUM system is safely transported to the installation site in specially designed hard cases. Installation is carried out by skilled expert engineers, maintaining compliance with all safety regulations.

Achieving carbon net neutrality by 2050 will require building and expanding social consensus on ‘carbon-reducing practices’ that lower our greenhouse gas emissions. PURIUM and vendors have established a consensus on the need for joint carbon neutrality efforts and practices in the face of climate change.

title: Contribution to society
headings: Donation of systems to education facilities and facilities for the socially vulnerable
ROKAF Education & Training Command Airbase Hospital
paragraphs: The ‘Smart Safeguards Gate’ represents PURIUM’s latest innovation technologies. As part of our corporate social responsibility leadership, we contribute Smart Safeguards Gate systems to various education facilities and facilities for children, seniors and other socially vulnerable groups.
lists: ROKAF Education & Training Command Airbase Hospital

title: Ethical management
paragraphs: PURIUM gives due consideration for society’s sound ethical expectations and values in corporate decision-making processes. We are implementing a healthy and equitable corporate culture with clearly defined legal accountability in line with social sensibilities and the purport of ethical management policy. PURIUM enforces ethical management practice guidelines for all employees and executives.
Nova secure inquiry portal
Management Planning Team, PURIUM Co. Ltd., 143, Yeongmun-ro 29beon-gil, Pogok-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do 17040

PURIUM promises prompt and accurate handling of ethical management violation reports.
Should whistle-blowers wish to receive an official reply to reports filed, a telephone number, e-mail address or other contact information must be provided.
For real-name reports, PURIUM protects reporter identity and report details under strictest confidentiality.
